description: This file initializes the React application by rendering the root component into the DOM. It imports core React modules, styling, and the main App component, then mounts the app onto the DOM element with id 'root'.

methods.name: ReactDOM.createRoot
methods.description: Creates a React root for rendering React components into a DOM element.

methods.name: root.render
methods.description: Renders the React component tree into the DOM.
